description: Style NoteMixing classic natural prints with a hint of the exotic (nailing the latest summer trend) colour block this top from Tonga for an effortlessly breezy vibe. For winter, you can smarten this up by layering it with a pastel toned cardi or a colour pop blazer. Product DetailsRed top with white polka dots, has a round neck, raglan three quarter sleeves, ruching at the side, an assymetrical hem and a removable chain and bead detail from the back neck to the right side for styleMaterial and Care96% polyester, 4% spandexHandwashDo not bleachHang to drySize and FitSlim fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
